message:
fix: add regex nil checks in callbacks, remove unsling globals

callbacks.go: All FindStringSubmatch calls now return errors when the
regex doesn't match instead of silently proceeding with empty strings.
Removes nolint:unparam directives since error paths are now reachable.

unsling.go/hook.go: Extract runUnslingWith(cmd, args, dryRun, force) so
callers pass options as function parameters instead of mutating
package-level globals unslingDryRun/unslingForce. Eliminates shared
mutable state between hook.go and unsling.go.

Fixes: gt-th1oe, gt-6hpr8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
